title: Merry Everything
excerpt: JC and I flew to Pittsburgh to spend Christmas with his family. It was snowing on our arrival on Friday evening and hasn't really snowed much since, even though it is COLD! So far it's been a whole lot of…
body: JC and I flew to Pittsburgh to spend Christmas with his family. It was snowing on our arrival on Friday evening and hasn't really snowed much since, even though it is COLD! So far it's been a whole lot of grocery shopping, cooking, eating, hanging out, playing games (Trivial Pursuit on the iPad and Fun Run on iPhones), eating, staying inside, drinking, eating and relaxing. Did I mention eating? Tonight we're having the Feast of Seven Fishes and because it makes JC's mom happy, we're all going to Christmas Mass tonight. the grand tree that stands in our hotel lobby Hope you all are having a wonderful holiday!
